---
title: "Research Question 3"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Project Report}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---
*Note*: Before running the code please run Cleaning And Merging The Data.R to generate the merged_data_cleaned.csv. The raw data files required for this analysis are in the github repository, due to size limitations we were unable to upload the compiled merged_data_cleaned.csv file.

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(UberLyftAnalysis)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(gratia)
library(mgcv)
library(DescTools)

merged_data <- read.csv("../merged_data_cleaned.csv")
```
